title: ferray-window: bessel_i0_scalar duplicated from ferray-ufunc special.rs
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

ferray-window/src/windows/mod.rs has its own bessel_i0_scalar function with the same Abramowitz & Stegun polynomial approximation as ferray-ufunc/src/ops/special.rs (bessel_i0). This is copy-pasted code that can drift. Either: (1) make ferray-ufunc's bessel_i0 scalar function public and depend on it, (2) extract the shared Bessel computation into ferray-core or a shared internal crate.
